title: pouteria altissima
intro: Pouteria altissima, also known as the Sapelli tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The sap of Pouteria altissima has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which aid in treating wounds, fever, and other health issues. The bark and leaves of the tree have been found to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against certain diseases. Pouteria altissima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and benefits, although its usage should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
